name: Shinhan K200 Strangle 5% Call 2
summary: Shinhan K200 Strangle 5% Call 2 is a structured product or strategy, likely offered by Shinhan Investment Corporation, based on the KOSPI 200 index and employing a strangle options strategy. The "5% Call 2" likely refers to the strike price of the call option being 5% above the current KOSPI 200 level and potentially indicates the number of call options involved.
